---
title: "Qiang Hu's resume"
author: Qiang Hu
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pagedown::html_resume:
    self_contained: true
# uncomment this line to produce HTML and PDF in RStudio:
knit: pagedown::chrome_print
---

Aside
================================================================================



Contact Info {#contact}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- <i class="fa fa-map-marker"></i> San Diego, CA
- <i class="fa fa-phone"></i> (858) 343-9200
- <i class="fa fa-envelope"></i> qih029@ucsd.edu
- <i class="fa fa-linkedin"></i> qiang-hu-12971385
Skills
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- English (Professional), Mandarin (Native)
- MATLAB, Python, C++, R, Excel, SQL, ETL, Business Intelligence Systems

Certifications
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Public Relations Sequence Junior
- Credit A Junior
- Customer Service Manager Junior

Main
================================================================================

Qiang Hu {#title}
================================================================================

Education {data-icon=graduation-cap data-concise=true}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### University of California, San Diego, Rady School of Management

Master of Science in Business Analytics

San Diego, CA

12/2026

- Major Courses: Business Analytics Consulting, Business Analytics in Marketing, Finance, and Operations, Customer Analytics, Collecting and Analyzing Large Data, Math and Programming for Business Analytics.

### University of California, Riverside, A. Gary Anderson Graduate School of Management

Master of Business Administration

Riverside, CA

06/2022

- GPA: 3.47/4.00
- Major Courses: Marketing Management, Management Ethics, Global Strategy and Management.

### Beijing International Studies University

Bachelor of Finance

Beijing, China

06/2020

Professional Experience {data-icon=suitcase}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Industrial and Commercial Bank of China (ICBC)

Credit Manager

Beijing, China

11/2024 - 07/2025

- Managed corporate credit services for major state-owned and defense industry clients including Aerospace Science, China Railway Construction and China Energy Group across high-tech, infrastructure and energy sectors.
- Led end-to-end credit processes from due diligence and proposal design to documentation, contract execution and post-loan monitoring.
- Facilitated high-level communications with corporate clients and internal departments to secure and execute large-scale credit facilities, overseeing projects with individual values from hundreds of millions to billions of RMB.
- Developed and enhanced post-loan management mechanisms, performing regular risk assessments and monitoring client fund usage to ensure portfolio quality and risk control.

### Industrial and Commercial Bank of China (ICBC)

Personal Customer Manager

Beijing, China

08/2024 - 11/2024

- Originated loans for small and medium enterprises, including hotels, restaurants, and construction firms, as well as individual clients, including over 500 employees of China Energy Group.
- Managed portfolios with single loans up to RMB 10 million and quarterly volumes exceeding RMB 100 million.
- Maintained and deepened client relationships, providing tailored solutions for account management, loan applications, and wealth management products.

### Industrial and Commercial Bank of China (ICBC)

Customer Service Manager

Beijing, China

04/2023 - 08/2024

- Managed business and personal accounts for state-owned enterprises including payroll and foreign exchange.
- Handled payroll operations for nearly 100,000 employees and foreign exchange transactions exceeding USD 5 million per transaction.

### China Guangfa Bank

Data Analyst Intern

Beijing, China

10/2019 - 11/2019

- Supported comprehensive financial investment services by preparing customized client plans and conducting in-depth market surveys using Excel and MATLAB.
- Analyzed investment risks and returns, and educated clients on regulations and operational processes.

### Industrial and Commercial Bank of China (ICBC)

Summer Intern

Beijing, China

06/2019 - 08/2019

- Assisted in financial investment services and new product launches, generating analysis reports to support client decisions.
- Coordinated cross-departmental communication for system upgrades and functional configurations.

Professional Affiliations & Leadership {data-icon=star}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Awards and Leadership

Beijing / San Diego

Recent

- Awarded 2023 and 2024 Outstanding Employee, ranking in the top 0.1% across more than 10,000 staff.
- Led the Economic World and Business Discussion Club, organizing simulations and workshops to strengthen data and analytical capabilities.
- Organized programs for the Global Economic Application Association, promoting cross-disciplinary economic literacy and structured internship programs.
